# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[02:45]` **佛罗里达国际大学的研究人员找到了帮助抗癌免疫细胞工作更长时间、更强的方法**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *FIU researchers find way to help cancer-fighting immune cells work longer and stronger* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:00]` **沃特世推出业界首款反相生物分离柱，GLP-1 表征速度提高 3 倍，LNP 成分分析速度提高 2 倍**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Waters Launches Industry-First Reversed-Phase Bioseparation Columns to Deliver Up to 3x Faster GLP-1 Characterization and 2x Faster LNP Component Analysis* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:00]` **Coya Therapeutics 宣布 ALSTARS 试验的第一批患者已开始盲法积极治疗延长阶段**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Coya Therapeutics Announces the First Cohort of Patients in the ALSTARS Trial Have Begun the Blinded Active-Treatment Extension Phase* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:00]` **沃特世推出业界首款反相生物分离柱，GLP-1 表征速度提高 3 倍，LNP 成分分析速度提高 2 倍**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Waters Launches Industry-First Reversed-Phase Bioseparation Columns to Deliver Up to 3x Faster GLP-1 Characterization and 2x Faster LNP Component Analysis* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[08:08]` **🏛️监管 | OriCell 的 GPC3 CAR-T 获得 NMPA 批准进行晚期晚期肝细胞癌验证性 II 期试验**
